retry_reason: kref_get_unless_zero fails only when the refcount is zero, indicating the object is dying or dead; retrying cannot revive it.
contract_summary: RCU-protected conditional get-wrapper: obtains a reference to an aa_label via kref_get_unless_zero, protected by an RCU read lock. The caller receives a pointer to the label with an elevated refcount, or NULL if the object is already being freed. The caller must release the reference using aa_put_label() when done. No other locks are required, but the caller must not rely on the label after the reference is released.
